character.definition: (same as 岐) name of a mountain in Shanxi province, name of a political district in ancient China, name of a river in Shanxi province, to diverge; to branch
a kind of animal; pig hog
(interchangeable 㾾) lump in the throat, sting of a poisonous insect (scorpion)
speech; words, to say; to talk, negative, hesitate
to lose in trade; to lose in weight or measure
a sound made to get a horse to move forward
the shin; to pierce; to touch
